untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on qualitative 'fundamental strength', 'big directional move probable', 'trader conviction', and 'fundamental thesis reversal' — concepts not expressible via technical indicators. ADX used as proxy for trend strength/conviction, but full signal intent cannot be mechanically translated. Position sizing (3-4% risk) and partial profit-taking (exit 25% at 4x risk) are backtest parameters, not price-based conditions.
translation_notes: ADX_14 > 25 used as proxy for 'clear directional move with conviction'. Stop loss set to 5% per parameters. Exit at 4x risk (0.04 return for 1% initial risk) approximates the 'allow profits to run' philosophy. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both long and short markets. The qualitative risk management components (acceptance of 5% loss, conviction-based entry) exceed indicator-based rule capability.
